message:
fix(parser): add recursion guard to FROM clause and clamp infinite floats

Add with_recursion_guard to parse_table_or_subquery to prevent stack
overflow from deeply nested parenthesized joins like (((((...))))). Also
validate that f64 parsing in the lexer and OversizedInt promotion in
expr.rs never produces Infinity — extreme values like 1e999 are now
clamped to f64::MAX.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
